description: Atari DQN checkpoint/resume GPU validation: SIGUSR1 preemption then auto-resume to 60k
notes: Validates the Atari DQN recovery path end to end on a GPU node: run with mmap replay and periodic checkpoints, SIGUSR1 mid-run, then --auto_resume to completion.
Asserts global_step reaches the target, resume_count=1, metrics_history is monotone without duplicates, and both the replay directory and the scaffolding checkpoint.pth are reclaimed.
Scratch space is temporary and deleted by the job; it is not a scientific result.
Result: preempted at step 21636/60000, resumed with replay_size=21636 intact, completed to 60000 with resume_count=1. History monotone; replay and scaffolding checkpoint reclaimed. ALL CHECKS PASSED.

Observed: mmap replay files are sparse, so a partially filled buffer occupies far less than its nominal size (616 MB at 21.6k of 60k steps). The 28 GB per-unit quota budget is therefore an upper bound.
